--- match_search_prefix_counts.sql
GRAPH FinGraph
MATCH ALL SHORTEST (a:Person)-[:Knows]->(b:Person)
MATCH ALL CHEAPEST (a2:Person)-[:Knows COST 1]->(b2:Person)
MATCH ANY 2 (a3:Person)-[:Knows]->(b3:Person)
MATCH SHORTEST 3 (a4:Person)-[:Knows]->(b4:Person)
MATCH CHEAPEST 1 (a5:Person)-[:Knows COST 1]->(b5:Person)
RETURN a, b

--- AST
&ast.GQLGraphQuery{
  GraphClause: &ast.GQLGraphClause{
    PropertyGraphName: &ast.Path{
      Idents: []*ast.Ident{
        &ast.Ident{
          NamePos: 6,
          NameEnd: 14,
          Name:    "FinGraph",
        },
      },
    },
  },
  Query: &ast.GQLMultiLinearQueryStatement{
    Statements: []ast.GQLLinearQueryStatement{
      &ast.GQLSimpleLinearQueryStatement{
        Statements: []ast.GQLPrimitiveQueryStatement{
          &ast.GQLMatch{
            OptionalPos: -1,
            Match:       15,
            Pattern:     &ast.GQLGraphPattern{
              Paths: []*ast.GQLTopLevelPathPattern{
                &ast.GQLTopLevelPathPattern{
                  SearchPrefix: &ast.GQLPathSearchPrefix{
                    StartPos: 21,
                    EndPos:   33,
                    Prefix:   "ALL SHORTEST",
                  },
                  Path: &ast.GQLPathPattern{
                    Terms: []*ast.GQLPathTerm{
                      &ast.GQLPathTerm{
                        Primary: &ast.GQLNodePattern{
                          Lparen:  34,
                          Rparen:  43,
                          Pattern: &ast.GQLElementPatternFiller{
                            EmptyPos: -1,
                            Variable: &ast.Ident{
                              NamePos: 35,
                              NameEnd: 36,
                              Name:    "a",
                            },
                            Label: &ast.GQLLabelFilter{
                              Is:    -1,
                              Colon: 36,
                              Expr:  &ast.GQLNameLabel{
                                Name: &ast.Ident{
                                  NamePos: 37,
                                  NameEnd: 43,
                                  Name:    "Person",
                                },
                              },
                            },
                          },
                        },
                      },
                      &ast.GQLPathTerm{
                        Primary: &ast.GQLEdgePattern{
                          StartPos:  44,
                          EndPos:    55,
                          Direction: "RIGHT",
                          Filler:    &ast.GQLElementPatternFiller{
                            EmptyPos: -1,
                            Label:    &ast.GQLLabelFilter{
                              Is:    -1,
                              Colon: 46,
                              Expr:  &ast.GQLNameLabel{
                                Name: &ast.Ident{
                                  NamePos: 47,
                                  NameEnd: 52,
                                  Name:    "Knows",
                                },
                              },
                            },
                          },
                        },
                      },
                      &ast.GQLPathTerm{
                        Primary: &ast.GQLNodePattern{
                          Lparen:  55,

                            EmptyPos: -1,

                              Name:    "b",

                            Label: &ast.GQLLabelFilter{
                              Is:    -1,
                              Colon: 57,

                                Name: &ast.Ident{
                                  NamePos: 58,
                                  NameEnd: 64,
                                  Name:    "Person",

                              },

                          },
                        },

                    },
                  },
                },
              },
            },
          },
          &ast.GQLMatch{

            Match:       66,

              Paths: []*ast.GQLTopLevelPathPattern{

                  SearchPrefix: &ast.GQLPathSearchPrefix{
                    StartPos: 72,

          &ast.GQLMatch{
            OptionalPos: -1,
            Match:       172,

              Paths: []*ast.GQLTopLevelPathPattern{
                &ast.GQLTopLevelPathPattern{
                  SearchPrefix: &ast.GQLPathSearchPrefix{
                    StartPos: 178,
                    EndPos:   188,

                    Count:    &ast.IntLiteral{
                      ValuePos: 187,
                      ValueEnd: 188,

                      Value:    "3",

                    Terms: []*ast.GQLPathTerm{

          &ast.GQLMatch{
            OptionalPos: -1,
            Match:       223,
            Pattern:     &ast.GQLGraphPattern{
              Paths: []*ast.GQLTopLevelPathPattern{
                &ast.GQLTopLevelPathPattern{
                  SearchPrefix: &ast.GQLPathSearchPrefix{
                    StartPos: 229,
                    EndPos:   239,
                    Prefix:   "CHEAPEST",
                    Count:    &ast.IntLiteral{
                      ValuePos: 238,
                      ValueEnd: 239,
                      Base:     10,
                      Value:    "1",
                    },

                  Path: &ast.GQLPathPattern{
                    Terms: []*ast.GQLPathTerm{

                                  NamePos: 254,

                              ValuePos: 265,
                              ValueEnd: 266,
                              Base:     10,
                              Value:    "1",
                            },
                          },
                        },

                      &ast.GQLPathTerm{
                        Primary: &ast.GQLNodePattern{
                          Lparen:  269,
                          Rparen:  279,
                          Pattern: &ast.GQLElementPatternFiller{
                            EmptyPos: -1,
                            Variable: &ast.Ident{
                              NamePos: 270,
                              NameEnd: 272,
                              Name:    "b5",

                            },
                          },
                        },
                      },
                    },
                  },
                },
              },
            },
          },
          &ast.GQLReturn{
            Return: 281,
            Items:  []*ast.GQLReturnItem{
              &ast.GQLReturnItem{
                Star: -1,
                Expr: &ast.Ident{
                  NamePos: 288,
                  NameEnd: 289,
                  Name:    "a",
                },
              },
              &ast.GQLReturnItem{
                Star: -1,
                Expr: &ast.Ident{
                  NamePos: 291,
                  NameEnd: 292,
                  Name:    "b",
                },
              },
            },
          },
        },
      },
    },
  },
}

--- SQL
GRAPH FinGraph MATCH ALL SHORTEST (a:Person)-[:Knows]->(b:Person) MATCH ALL CHEAPEST (a2:Person)-[:Knows COST 1]->(b2:Person) MATCH ANY 2 (a3:Person)-[:Knows]->(b3:Person) MATCH SHORTEST 3 (a4:Person)-[:Knows]->(b4:Person) MATCH CHEAPEST 1 (a5:Person)-[:Knows COST 1]->(b5:Person) RETURN a, b
